creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Superseded by ports/154636. 

Note to submitter: we prefer updates to existing ports to be in diff -ruN 
format, as per the Porter's Handbook. 

Also, apache@ is a mailing list, so I'm not sure why you're asking for 
maintainership.  OTOH I'm not on the apache@ team.
